text: Dr. Zhang, M.D., Ph.D., F.A.C.C., presented at the 5th Ann. Conf. on Cardiology (ISBN: 978-0-12-345678-9) data showing LDL reductions of 42%±7% using 20mg/dL dosing protocols.

text: The manuscript cited Vol. 47, No. 3, pp. 1234–89 of the J. Phys. Chem., noting that samples required ≥99.9% purity and storage at −80°C±2°C in 50μg/mL aliquots.
transcript: The manuscript cited Volume 47, Number 3, pp. 1234-89 of the "J. Phys. Chem.", noting that samples required 99.9% purity and storage at 80°C in 50 mL aliquots.

text: According to IEEE Trans. Vol. 15, pp. 67–142, the circuit required 3.3V±5%, 150mA max., with capacitance ≤10μF and operating temps between −40°C and +85°C per MIL-STD-883.
transcript: According to IEEE Trans. Vol. 15, PPIKO 67142, the circuit required 3.3V ±5%, 150mA max, with capacitance no more than 10μF and operating temps between 40°C and +185°C per mil STD 883.

transcript: The athlete, standing 6'3" and weighing 195 lb, completed the 100 meters in 9.58 sec at the 23rd Intel Championships held on St. Patrick's Day at St. Mary's Stadium.

text: Rev. Dr. St. Pierre, Th.D., D.D., residing at St. Augustine's Rectory, 456 St. James Pl., announced services at 10:30am and 6:45pm; call 0800-PRAYERS or visit www.st-aug.org.uk.
transcript: Rev. Dr. St. Pierre, Th.D., D.D., residing at St. Augustine's Rectory, 456 St. James's Pell, announce services at 10:30 AM and 6:45 PM. Call 800-PRAYERS or visit www.staug.org.uk.

text: Escherichia coli strain O157:H7 and Salmonella enterica serovar Typhimurium strain LT2 harboring blaCTX-M-15 require meropenem 2g IV q8h when MIC values reach 8-16μg/mL per EUCAST v.13.0 breakpoints.
transcript: Escherichia coli strain O157:H7 and Salmonella enterica serovar Typhimurium strain LT2 harboring BLACTXm15 require meropenem 2g IV/IVQ8H when MIC values reach 8-16 μg/mL per EUCAST V13.0 breakpoints.

text: Streptococcus pneumoniae strain TIGR4 expressing pbp2b mutations and Haemophilus influenzae type b require ceftriaxone 50mg/kg/day IV divided q12h not exceeding 4g/24h, with CSF penetration verified at 2.5-7.5μg/mL per General Electric v. Joiner, 522 U.S. 136 (1997) causation standards.
transcript: Streptococcus pneumoniae strain TIGR4 expressing pBP2b mutations and Haemophilus influenzae type B require ceftriaxone 50 mg/kg/d IV divided q12h not exceeding 4 g/24 h, with CSF penetration verified at 2.5-7.5 mL per General Electric Weyden-Joyner (522 US 136, 1997) causation standards.

text: In Kumho Tire Co. v. Carmichael, 526 U.S. 137 (1999), expert testimony regarding (R)-2-acetamido-N-(2,6-dimethylphenyl)propanamide (CAS 53994-73-3) metabolism via CYP2D6*17 allele variants was challenged under Fed.R.Evid. 702.
transcript: In Kumho Tire, Combrevey, Carmichael, 526 U.S. 137, 1999, expert testimony regarding R-(SO₂)-acetamido-N-(2,6)-dimethylphenylpropanamide (CAS 53994733) metabolism via CYP2D6 gene 17 allele variants was challenged under Fed. DRR EVID 702.

text: Administer 0.25mL of 1×10⁻⁴ mol/L (2R,3S,4R,5R)-2,3,4,5,6-pentahydroxyhexanal (CAS 50-99-7) to Saccharomyces cerevisiae strain S288C and Candida albicans strain SC5314 at 30.0°C ± 0.2°C maintaining pH 5.5 ± 0.05 per ASTM E2149-13a.
transcript: Administer 0.25 mL of 1x10���� mL 2R, 3S, 4R, 5R, 2,3,4,5,6-pentahydroxyhexanal (EKS 509927) to Saccharomyces cerevisiae strain S288C and Candida albicans strain SC5314 at 30.0 °C +0.2 °C maintaining pH 5.5 +0.05 per ASTM E2149-13A.

text: Administer 15mg/kg IV q6h of piperacillin-tazobactam 4.5g for Pseudomonas aeruginosa strain PAO1 harboring oprD mutations, per Daubert v. Merrell Dow, 509 U.S. 579 (1993) evidentiary standards.
transcript: Administer 15 mg/kg IV (qSKH) of piperacillin/tazobactam 4.5g for Pseudomonas aeruginosa strain PAO1 harboring OPRD mutations (Perdauber v. Merrill-Dow, 509 US 579, 1993; Evidentiary Standards).

text: Per Frye v. United States, 293 F. 1013 (D.C. Cir. 1923), analysis of (S)-2-amino-3-(3,4-dihydroxyphenyl)propanoic acid (CAS 59-92-7) degradation via COMT Val158Met polymorphism requires HPLC-MS/MS sensitivity ≤0.5ng/mL conforming to FDA Guidance 2018.
transcript: Prof. Fry v. United States, 293 F. 1013, D.C., 19-23. Analysis of S-(2-amino-3,3,4-dihydroxyphenyl)propanoic acid, K.S. 5992-7. Degradation via COMT/VAL158Met polymorphism requires HPLC-MS/MS sensitivity. 0.5 ng/mL, conforming to FDA guidance 2018.

text: Titrate 2.5mg/kg/min of (±)-4-(2-aminoethyl)benzene-1,2-diol (CAS 51-61-6) IV maintaining MAP ≥65mmHg per RFC 2616 §14.9 cache-control directives for real-time hemodynamic monitoring systems compliant with ISO 80601-2-61:2017.
transcript: titrate 2.5 mg/kg/min of IOM+. IV: 2-aminoethylbenzene 1,2-diol (CAS 516126). IV: maintaining mappi, josh 65 mL/hr per RFC 2616. Par 14.9: CASH control directives for real-time hemodynamic monitoring systems compliant with ISO 80601:2:61:2017.

text: Mycobacterium tuberculosis strain H37Rv and Mycobacterium bovis BCG expressing rpoB S531L mutations demonstrate rifampicin MIC >128μg/mL when tested per CLSI M24-A2:2011 at pH 6.8 ± 0.1 and 37.0°C ± 0.5°C.
transcript: Mycobacterium tuberculosis strain H37Rv and Mycobacterium bovis (BCG) expressing RpoB S531L mutations demonstrate rifampicin MIC 128 μmol/mL when tested per CLSI M24A2 (2011) at pH 6.8 (+0.1) and 37.0°C (+0.5°C).

text: The conduct of the Leicester conference will conduct attendees through Tadhg's analysis of schadenfreude in German literature.
transcript: The conduct of the Leicester Conference will conduct attendees through Todgy's analysis of Schadenfreude in German literature.

text: The present study will present evidence that Caoimhe experienced schadenfreude watching her rival's failure in Loughborough.
transcript: The present study will present evidence that Kaoime experienced schadenfreude watching her rival's failure in Loughborough.

text: When they present the present to Aoife at Loughborough, they'll record her record collection featuring Siobhán's Welsh compositions.
transcript: When they present the present to Eowyn at Lothborough, they'll record her record collection featuring Siobhan's Welsh compositions.

text: Dr. Nguyen's Bildungsroman explores how Tadhg must conduct himself with proper conduct while studying at Magdalen College.
transcript: Dr. Nguyen's Bildungsroman explores how Todd must conduct himself with proper conduct while studying at Magdalen College.

text: Professor Mbeki will record Niamh's record-breaking translation of Nahuatl poetry with remarkable gemütlichkeit.
transcript: Professor Mbeki will record Nieves' record-breaking translation of Nahuatl poetry with remarkable Gemütlichkeit.

text: Aoife needed a permit to film, but the Leicester council wouldn't permit shooting near the Ptolemy manuscript exhibit.
transcript: Awaiyaf needed a permit to film, but the Leicester Council wouldn't permit shooting near the Ptolemy manuscript exhibit.

text: The content of Saoirse's thesis made her content, exploring weltanschauung in Gloucester's medieval texts.
transcript: The content of Sayers's thesis made her content, exploring Weltanschauung in Gloucester's medieval texts.

text: Eithne and Caoilfhinn debated the mise en scène while eating Worcestershire sauce with Dr. Nguyen.
transcript: Aithne and Cao Ailfín debated the Mise en Scène while eating Worcestershire sauce with Dr. Nguyen.

text: We fine-tuned LLaMA 3.1 405B using LoRA on the meta-llama/Llama-3.1-405B-Instruct-hf checkpoint with rank 64 adapters.
transcript: We fine-tuned LLaMA 3.1 4Rotom 5B using LoRA on the Meta LLaMA, LLaMA 3.1 4Rotom 5B Instruct A-HF checkpoint with rank 64 adapters.

text: We benchmarked 01-ai/Yi-1.5-34B-Chat-16K against meta-llama/Llama-3.1-70B-Instruct using MMLU, GSM8K@4-shot, and HumanEval benchmarks.
The claude-sonnet-4-5 model outperformed Gemma-2-27B-it on coding benchmarks as described in §3.2 of the technical report.
transcript: The Claude-Sanneh 4-5 model outperformed Gemma 2-27BiT on coding benchmarks as described in paragraph 3.2 of the technical report.

text: Comparing meta-llama/Llama-2-7b-chat-hf versus GPT-4o shows that FP16 quantization reduces latency by 40% without accuracy loss.
transcript: Comparing Meta LLaMA, LLaMA 2, 7B-Chat-HHF versus GPT-4o shows that FP16 quantization reduces latency by 40% without accuracy loss.

text: Our pipeline is based on LLaMA-3.1-8B → fine-tuned on ShareGPT4 → RLHF’d with DPO, then merged into the mistralai/Mixtral-8×7B-Instruct-v0.1 architecture.
We fine-tuned deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-32B on 4×A100 80GB SXM with bf16, ZeRO-3, gradient_checkpointing=True, and lr=2e-5.
We loaded mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.1 from Hugging Face and applied LoRA fine-tuning at checkpoint-5000 with 3.2B parameters.
transcript: We loaded Mistraline Mistral 7B Instruct v0.1 from Hugging Face and applied LoRA fine-tuning at checkpoint 5000 with 3.2B parameters.

text: Our experiments with Gemma-2-27B-it and INT8 quantization on the mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.1 checkpoint-5000 achieved 87.6% accuracy on MMLU.
transcript: Our experiments with Gemma 2 27-bit and INT8 quantization on the Mistral AI 7B instruct v0.1 checkpoint 5000 achieved 87.6% accuracy on MMLU.

transcript: For participants ages 18 to 65, blood pressure should range from 90/60 to 120/80 mmHg, with temperatures between 97.8°F and 99.1°F.

transcript: Henry VIII's reign from 1509 to 1547 saw England's break from Rome, while Louis XIV of France ruled for 72 years.

transcript: Pope Benedict XVI resigned in 2013, the first pope to do so since Gregory XIII in 1415.

text: King Henry the 3rd (III), King Henry the 8th (VIII), and the XXIInd amendment were all discussed in the IVth century BC symposium.

transcript: The Apollo 11 mission landed on July 20, 1969, fulfilling Kennedy's goal set in the early 1960s.

transcript: The study spanning pp. 234-289 in volume 43 shows that 4/5 of the 1,184 participants were born between 1984 and 1999.

text: DO NOT—and I mean DO NOT—open that email attachment under ANY circumstances whatsoever.
transcript: Do not, and I mean do not, open that email attachment under any circumstances whatsoever.

text: Ugh, seriously? I've told you like... I don't know, a MILLION times already.
transcript: Seriously? I've told you like, I don't know, a million times already.

transcript: He started snoring, "Zzz, zzz," and I just thought, "You know what? Forget it. Not worth it."

transcript: She whispered, "Maybe we should leave," then suddenly yelled, "Run! Now!"

transcript: The balloon went pop and scared everyone. Then the baby went wah for like an hour straight.
